case_title: JAMES BUMPUS VS. DIANA ROSE NELMS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JUD WAGGOMAN IN SUPPORT OF STIPULATED EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUMPUS, JAMES
MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-25-2008 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE ON FEB-02-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 PURSUANT TO EX PARTE ORDER FILED ON 8/20/08. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIANA NELMS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THERE IS DISPUTED ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT IN THE FOLLOWING: WHETHER PLAINTIFF AND DECEDENT HAD A CONTRACT REQUIRING THE PAYMENT OR REIMBURSEMENT OF LABOR MATERIAL COSTS BY THE DECEDENT TO PLAINTIFF OTHER THAN OUT OF DECEDENT'S ESTATE, AND THE EVIDENCE WHICH INDICATES THAT A TRIABLE CONTROVERSY EXISTS IS THAT SET FORTH IN THE DECLARATIONS OF JAMES BUMPS AND DAWSON CRAWFORD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/JEM) JUDGE: JOHN E. MUNTER; REPORTER: RHONDA AQUILINA, CSR 	956

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-07-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DIANA NELMS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Jud Waggoman (530.743.3036) for plaintiff and responding party
Dawson Crawford (408.395.9898) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: denied. There is disputed issue of material fact in the following: whether plaintiff and decedent had a contract requiring the payment or reimbursement of labor material costs by the decedent to plaintiff other than out of decedent's estate, and the evidence which indicates that a triable controversy exists is that set forth in the declarations of James Bumps and Dawson Crawford. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/JEM/JW) Judge: John E. Munter; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Continued To Feb-02-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-25-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Off Calendar
